instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: History project
task.initialEmail: Hi,||We need to finish our history project before Monday. [1]Do you think we should write about castles?[/1]||[2]Can we work at your house this afternoon?[/2] My computer isn’t working at the moment.||[3]What pictures should we use?[/3] The teacher said the project must look interesting.||[4]Should we ask the teacher for more time?[/4]||Write back soon||Noah

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Noah,||Thanks for your message. [1]Yes, I think writing about castles is a good idea because there is a lot of information about them online.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but we can’t work at my house this afternoon because my cousins are visiting and it will be too noisy.[/2]||[3]We should use pictures of old castles, maps and maybe a drawing of how people lived inside them.[/3]||[4]No, I don’t think we should ask the teacher for more time because we can finish it tomorrow if we work hard.[/4]||See you soon,||Grace
